$comment: Descriptive schema only — not yet wired to a validator (no ajv dependency added as part of this step; see main/theme-engine/style-engine.js). Documents the CURRENT token vocabulary style-engine.js actually compiles. The full token set sketched in design doc §5.3 (gradient/stroke/shadow/blur/glass/background/componentOverrides) is aspirational for later steps and intentionally not required here yet.
title: style.json

componentOverrides.description: Reserved for design doc §5.3's per-component style overrides. Not yet read by style-engine.js.
